parameters.query:
INSERT INTO prs (github_pr_id, repo, pr_number, title, author, head_sha)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.github_pr_id }},
  '{{ $json.owner }}/{{ $json.repo }}',
  {{ $json.pr_number }},
  $$ {{ $json.pr_title }} $$,
  '{{ $json.author }}',
  '{{ $json.head_sha }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (repo, pr_number) DO UPDATE
  SET head_sha = EXCLUDED.head_sha,
      reviewed_at = NOW()
RETURNING id;

parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Extract PR Fields').first().json.owner }}/{{ $('Extract PR Fields').first().json.repo }}/pulls/{{ $('Extract PR Fields').first().json.pr_number }}/files

=https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Extract PR Fields').first().json.owner }}/{{ $('Extract PR Fields').first().json.repo }}/contents/{{ $json.filename }}?ref={{ $('Extract PR Fields').first().json.head_sha }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'critical') AS critical,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'high')     AS high,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'medium')   AS medium,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'low')      AS low,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'nit')      AS nit,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM findings
WHERE pr_id = {{ $('Upsert PR Row').first().json.id }};

parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Extract PR Fields').first().json.owner }}/{{ $('Extract PR Fields').first().json.repo }}/issues/{{ $('Extract PR Fields').first().json.pr_number }}/comments
parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "body": "## 🤖 ReviewAI · Review Summary

**{{ $json.total }} findings** across this PR

| Severity | Count |
| --- | ---: |
| 🔴 Critical | {{ $json.critical }} |
| 🟠 High | {{ $json.high }} |
| 🟡 Medium | {{ $json.medium }} |
| 🟢 Low | {{ $json.low }} |
| ⚪ Nit | {{ $json.nit }} |

See inline comments above for details. Push a fix and I'll re-review automatically.

— _[ProITBridge ReviewAI](https://proitbridge-reviewai.vercel.app) · Strive For Better Future_"
}
